suggestions.rationale: Extensive test failures remain (Geth 49, Besu 19, Nethermind/Reth 400+). With minor spec changes deferred to devnet-4, need to determine if devnet-3 can be stabilized or should transition to devnet-4.
Nethermind and Erigon failing to stay at head on trunk branches. Requires stable releases with GetBlobV3 instead of unstable trunk branches to proceed with testnet deployment.

suggestions.topic: ePBS devnet-1 specification and launch timeline
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #75 targeted spec release end-of-week (March 27). Alpha4 with PTC lookahead likely required. Need status update on spec completion and client readiness for devnet-1 launch.

suggestions.topic: Batch I/O prefetch flag for benchmarking
suggestions.rationale: Marked as urgently needed from Nethermind and Erigon in ACDT #75 for BAL benchmarking isolation. Flag must isolate prefetch optimization without disabling other BAL optimizations.

ACDT #75 proposed replacing bal-devnet-4 with Glamsterdam-devnet-0. With multiple items deferred to devnet-4 (dynamic 8037, minor spec changes), need to clarify naming and scope for next BAL iteration.

suggestions.topic: perf-devnet-3 client sync issues and 5 Gigagas testing
suggestions.rationale: Geth synced successfully, but Reth/Nethermind/Besu experiencing sync issues. 5 Gigagas testing revealing out-of-memory issues. State bloat testing approaching 4TB target with depth-based worst cases.
Breakout scheduled for March 25 (day before this call). If breakout occurred, need to confirm Strategy 2 (canonical paymaster) vs Strategy 1 (self-relaying) resolution and next steps.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API ACD approval status
suggestions.rationale: Deferred to ACD in ACDT #73 (March 9). Giulio implemented POC across 6 clients. Check if ACD has provided final approval for optional implementation via content-type headers.
